name: Arlecchino ~ “They're so very beautiful... aren’t they?”
description:
“A mother’s love

Perchance a dream?

A father’s respect

Mayhaps a distant thought?

Does she care

Or is she really just

...

A cold, devoted ‘Father’?”

Not enough Arlecchino propaganda on this stupid site so here’s something that isn’t just pure smut. You’re welcome.

Getting a bit tired of only seeing smutty based Arlecchino bots, so I decided to have a 'Help the hot woman get over her anxiety' bot.

God she's such a cutie patootie

Bot is being tested rn

Tested with JAI, needs a bit of work but temp 1.1 seemed to work well? Speech is fine, all of that. I'll test with Gemini when it decides to lock in ig, it's bugging rn.

Next bot'll be probably fish woman from HSR. Have some sick ideas for her.

Edit 1: Gemini is still tweaking but I added an actual Scenario. Here's hoping that'll do anything.
